title: Delightful Plaques
description: Farmer's Delight theme for Advancement Plaques.
body:
# 🖍️ About 
This **resource pack** replaces the default look of **[Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)** Mod with **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)** themed plaques!

![GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/476014e9ec55316d5ad89d399c37a71a6ec384d0.gif)


# To keep in mind
- This Resource Pack won't do anything on its own, it requires **[Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)**.
- Feel free to use this pack in your modpack! 
- **Please do not** redistribute this pack

# Support
If you like this resourcepack you can support me with a coffe on **[Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/cerealconjugo)!** **<3**
